theme.description: A premium AI career operating system — calm, sharp, futuristic, and trustworthy. Linear × Notion × Vercel × Stripe Dashboard vibe.

tech_stack_rules.file_extension: Use .js and .jsx files exclusively. Do NOT use .ts or .tsx files.
tech_stack_rules.components: Use customized Shadcn UI primitives (JavaScript versions) alongside pure HTML/Tailwind.
tech_stack_rules.styling: Tailwind CSS with arbitrary values where necessary for exact brand matching.

rules: Avoid pure black (#000000). Always use layered dark grays like #0A0A0A.
Never use pure white (#FFFFFF) for body text to prevent glare; use off-white (#F3F4F6).
Use #8B5CF6 (Violet) specifically and exclusively for AI generation states, matching, and AI suggestions.

headings.recommended_family: Cabinet Grotesk or Satoshi (Fallback to system UI sans-serif)

rules: Overlines / Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
H1 size should not exceed text-5xl.

surface_strategy.cards: rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[#141414] p-6 shadow-sm

overall_structure: Left Sidebar (w-64): Fixed navigation, Application History, Status Tracking.
Main Workspace: Tabs for Resume, Fit Analysis, Cover Letter, Interview Pack, ATS Score.
Right Sidebar (w-80): Collapsible AI Assistant / Command Palette.

components_strategy.buttons: Shadcn primitives. Primary: bg-[#0066FF] hover:bg-[#0052CC] text-white. Use data-testid.
components_strategy.tabs: Clean, Vercel-like tabs. Active state gets a subtle bg highlight and high contrast text.
components_strategy.diff_view: Two-pane side-by-side layout (grid-cols-2). Left pane: red/warning highlights for removed text. Right pane: emerald highlights for AI-improved text.
components_strategy.status_timeline: Vertical stepped timeline for job application status, utilizing emerald/amber indicator dots.
components_strategy.ai_progress: Violet glowing indeterminate progress bar or shimmering skeletal loaders (animate-pulse with from-violet-500/20 via-violet-500/10 to-transparent) during AI parsing.

icons.rules: Keep icons minimal, stroke-width 1.5. Use AI sparkles icon (Sparkles) for AI actions.

rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Convention: kebab-case, role-based. Example: data-testid='upload-resume-button', data-testid='ats-score-display'.

image_urls.description: Vibrant abstract background with a blurred purple glow.
Elegant studio portrait of a woman against a black background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using pure HTML/Tailwind for layouts and customized JS Shadcn components for interactivity. Ensure NO TypeScript (.tsx) files are created.
Implement a default dark mode matching the Vercel x Linear aesthetic: deep charcoal base, glassy panels, rounded-2xl cards, and soft shadows.
For the 'Fit Analysis' and 'ATS Score' sections, use dynamic charts or circular progress indicators.
Ensure 'Violet' (#8B5CF6) is reserved exclusively to signal AI at work (e.g., generation states, AI rewriting).
Implement the side-by-side Diff View layout cleanly so users can compare original vs AI-rewritten resumes.
Apply 'data-testid' to ALL buttons, tabs, inputs, and major state containers for testing.
Do not use generic sans-serif for headings; apply a premium tracking-tight display font styling.
